tasks.content: Implement ScopedModelsSelectorModal (React + Ink)
Implement UserMessageSelectorModal (React + Ink)
Add modal types to InkApp and integrate handlers
Implement missing message components (BranchSummary, CompactionSummary, SkillInvocation, Custom)
Add message component renderers to MessageItem.tsx
Create FooterDataProvider for centralized footer state
Run build and tests to verify integration
Update docs/TODO.md with progress
Implement full bindExtensions in InkApp with working commandContextActions
Implement createExtensionUIContext with all required methods (select, confirm, input, notify, setStatus, setWidget, setHeader, setFooter, etc.)
Add extension shortcut registration (setupExtensionShortcuts)
Implement showLoadedResources and startup notices
Test extension loading and commands
Implement /export command (HTML export with proper formatting)
Implement /import command (JSONL import with session switching)
Implement /share command (GitHub gist with auth)
Implement /name command (session display name with live update)
Implement /session command (show session stats modal)
Implement /tree command (tree navigation with summarization options)
Implement /reload command (full resource reload)
Implement /compact command (manual compaction with custom instructions)
Test all command handlers end-to-end
